tasks.label: 🔧 setup: criar venv e instalar dependências
tasks.command: python -m venv .venv && .venv/Scripts/pip install --upgrade pip -q && .venv/Scripts/pip install chromadb --prefer-binary -q && .venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt -q && echo 'Setup concluído.'

tasks.label: 📦 install: atualizar dependências
tasks.command: .venv/Scripts/pip install chromadb --prefer-binary -q && .venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt -q && echo 'Dependências atualizadas.'

tasks.label: 🔑 keys: gerar FERNET_KEY e JWT_SECRET
tasks.command: echo '' && echo 'FERNET_KEY=' && .venv/Scripts/python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())" && echo '' && echo 'JWT_SECRET=' && .venv/Scripts/python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))" && echo ''

tasks.label: 🎟️ invite: criar código de convite
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/admin/invite | .venv/Scripts/python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('\nCódigo de convite:', d['invite_code'], '\n')"

tasks.label: 🧹 clean: remover banco e chromadb
tasks.command: rm -f aerus.db && rm -rf chroma_db && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo 'Limpeza concluída.'
